elements.label: Description
elements.value: Mid-tier merge fruit. Takes significant space. Merges into Peach.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/pear.schema.json, set ct_pear_radius to {{ct_pear_radius}}]
Set Pear radius to {{ct_pear_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/pear.schema.json, set ct_pear_score to {{ct_pear_score}}]
Set Pear merge score to {{ct_pear_score}} points.
